# Admonitions

This chapter exercises GitHub-style admonitions (a.k.a. alerts) that mdBook
renders natively. The preprocessor must preserve the alert markers while still
linking glossary terms inside the body.

> [!NOTE]
> The API is documented elsewhere.

> [!TIP]
> Use REST when possible.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> Read the XPT spec first.

> [!WARNING]
> Don't bypass the CLI guardrails.

> [!CAUTION]
> The JSON payload is unstable.
